title: Do not auto-publish unattended market refresh conclusions yet
rejection_reason: The current slice adds research intelligence and governed review, but unattended recurring refresh is still too weak on freshness, contradiction handling, and escalation policy to claim autonomous safety.
failure_signals: Freshness controls are documented but not yet runtime-enforced.
Contradiction handling is still artifact-level rather than execution-level.
retry_conditions: Retry after runtime auto-research execution can block on stale or contradictory evidence.
Retry after recurring watchlists and refresh intervals are test-covered.
retained_lessons: The market rewards continuous refresh, but ProductOS should not claim unattended trust before the gates are real.
Loophole capture is part of the product quality story, not an embarrassment to hide.
